subject: Accessibility Sprint 4 — CT01 closed (--ink-3-aaa deployed: all color:var(--ink-3) text uses and fill:var(--ink-3) SVG text uses replaced site-wide), RL01 closed (plain-language FAQ), DS01 fully closed (zero !important in repo). Technical AAA baseline achieved across public marketing site and product console stylesheets.

milestone.name: Technical AAA baseline achieved
milestone.scope: Public marketing site and product console stylesheets (console/styles.css, recruiter/console/styles.css). Zero remaining color:var(--ink-3) text-context uses in repository. Remaining open items are product-engineering gaps (Gaps 01–03: Console charts, tour linearization, streaming toggle) and one minor editorial migration (A11Y-Mn08: briefing timestamps, T+180d). None block a core task; all have documented workarounds. Phase transitions from backlog-burndown to continuous-monitoring.

majors_closed.fix: New token --ink-3-aaa: #3d4456 (8.27:1 on --paper #f4ecda). Replaces --ink-3 (#4b5365, 6.55:1) in all text roles — both CSS color property and SVG fill property on text elements. Pass 1 (CSS color, space-variant): 22 rules in assets/styles.css; 94 HTML files (color: var(--ink-3) → color: var(--ink-3-aaa) in inline style blocks; --ink-3-aaa added to every local :root block). Site-nav scoped block (67 files): --ink-3-aaa: #3d4456 added to .site-nav scope; .sn-mob-section summary::after arrow fixed from rgba(14,22,38,.42) composite (2.64:1) to var(--ink-3-aaa) (8.27:1). Pass 2 (CSS color, no-space variant): 53 additional color:var(--ink-3) instances in 15 HTML files replaced. console/styles.css and recruiter/console/styles.css: --ink-3-aaa: #3d4456 added to :root in both; 8 text-color rules in console/styles.css and 33 in recruiter/console/styles.css upgraded. Pass 3 (SVG text fill): fill: var(--ink-3) on SVG <text> elements upgraded. assets/styles.css .donut-sub rule (affects financials/, deck/): fill: var(--ink-3-aaa). financials/index.html local .donut-sub: fill: var(--ink-3-aaa). eval/index.html .live-chart-mount svg text: fill:var(--ink-3-aaa). deck/index.html .donut text.center-sub, .wedge-svg .tick-label, .wedge-svg .y-label, .comp-svg .quad-label: fill: var(--ink-3-aaa). Non-text uses of --ink-3 (border-color, background, SVG fills on paths/rects/circles, chart swatches) intentionally retained — 30+ decorative uses, correct. --ink-mute-aa upgraded: was #525968 (5.98:1, AA only); now #404755 (7.93:1, AAA). graph/index.html and graph/mcp.html local definitions updated. Zero remaining color:var(--ink-3) or fill:var(--ink-3) text-context uses in repository. All text uses of --ink-3 and --ink-mute-aa now pass WCAG 1.4.6 AAA.

Scoped to product + FAQ per Sprint 3 deferred plan. Product page (/product/): verified grade 8–9 — no changes needed. FAQ (/faq/): two answers in §03 Security section received <details class='qa-plain'> blocks with plain-language alternatives. EU AI Act answer (Articles 13/14 reference): plain note explains 'limited risk' classification without regulatory citations. NYC AEDT answer (Local Law 144): plain note explains scope without legal language. Style: .qa-plain — Newsreader italic body, JetBrains Mono summary label at --ink-3-aaa. Additive approach: original technical answers preserved for InfoSec professionals. All other FAQ sections verified grade 8 or below. Legal, board, security documentation remain out of scope (legitimate precise language).

minor_closed.description: Final 19 !important declarations across 7 files — fully closed. Zero !important remain in repository.

fixes: .metric border-right at 480px: enumerated .metric:nth-child(3n), :nth-child(2n) to raise specificity, removing !important
prefers-reduced-motion: replaced * { animation-duration !important } with targeted selectors: a/.nav/.nav-cta transitions, .dot-big/.comp-dot.ok::after animations
print block: .indicator .indicator-h1 etc. (specificity 0,2,0) replaces .indicator-h1 etc. (0,1,0) — no !important needed
.fintable .footnote td: source order wins over td:last-child (same specificity, later in cascade) — !important was unnecessary, removed
prefers-reduced-motion: enumerated section animation-delay chain and a { transition: none }
scroll-snap-type: none !important — later media block wins by source order, !important unnecessary, removed
.q-card:hover transform !important — .q-card.qN has specificity (0,2,0) beating :hover (0,1,0). Fixed: .q-card.q1:hover…q6:hover (0,2,0) at natural specificity
.q-card transform: none !important at 760px — same: enumerated .q-card.q1…q6 in media block
.row .full display: block !important in print — fixed: .row .full, .row[data-expanded] .full (0,1,2) beats .row .full { display: none } (0,0,2)

prefers-reduced-motion * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important } — enumerated all animated selectors (.brand .dot, .barline-fill, .funnel-stage .bar, .eval-stacked > span, .feed-row.fresh::after, .partner-pill .pip, .spark-line, .panel)
prefers-reduced-motion * { animation-duration/iteration/transition !important } — enumerated .ai-mark.is-live, .streaming-cursor (animations) and transition selectors at natural specificity

minor_closed.bonus: console/styles.css: 2 additional !important declarations found and remediated (not in Sprint 4 scope — closed opportunistically). Total repository !important declarations: 0.

--ink-3-aaa.role: text/UI-copy. --ink-3 retained for decorative non-text: borders, bg, SVG fills, chart swatches

open_remaining.workaround: text summary link at top of /tour/
Show static result toggle in Settings > Accessibility
Timestamps visible and human-readable; gap is machine-readable semantics only

files_modified: assets/styles.css (CT01: 22 color rules + .donut-sub SVG text fill)
deck/index.html (CT01: 4 SVG text fill rules + 1 color rule)
console/styles.css (CT01 pass 2: 8 color rules + DS01 bonus)
eval/index.html (CT01 pass 2: 22 color rules + SVG text fill)
94 HTML files (CT01 pass 1 — ink-3-aaa mass deploy)
